creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Would you please consider updating phpbb3.  The current version was released May 2021.  Some worthwhile changes described here:
https://wiki.phpbb.com/Release_Highlights/3.3.4

Notably postgresql backup error was addressed in 3.3.2
https://tracker.phpbb.com/browse/PHPBB3-16525

And security improvement in 3.3.3
